subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Arise to serve God and His Cause, and be as a blazing flame unto the enemies of My Most Glorious Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد قم علی خدمه الله و امره و کن لهیب الحمراء لاعداء جمالی الابهی و
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @importance of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
